calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-11-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-14-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Michael Rossoff, Esq for for Plaintiff: Ambassador Hotel SRO Associates.
Plaintiff's Witness: Gabriele Desmond, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Ronald McWilliams.
Exhibit 1 - Residential Rental Agreement---------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three Day Notice---------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 55 Mason St., #419, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $580.76
Waived Fees and Costs.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court and to prepare Judgment.

Oct. 14, 2005
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court, granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-29-2005 Continued To Oct-11-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF AMBASSADOR HOTEL SRO ASSOCIATES
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY RUDY BALDERAMA FOR DEFENDANT RONALD MCWILLIAMS

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF ASKED FOR PROTECTED TRIAL DATE OF
OCTOBER 11, 2005.

JUDGE PRO TEM: TEILA CHALMERS; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
